zh.lifeSummary: 當Pieter Jan Losee於1659年出生在美國紐約州朗 易曼德時，他的父親Jan Corneliszen Losee35歲，母親Janneken Pieters35歲。他於1680年3月14日與Sara Jacob Kolfs在美國紐約州金斯福拉特布申結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1704年之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布申維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pieter Jan Losee于1659年出生在美国纽约州朗 易曼德时，他的父亲Jan Corneliszen Losee35岁，母亲Janneken Pieters35岁。他于1680年3月14日与Sara Jacob Kolfs在美国纽约州金斯福拉特布申结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1704年之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼金斯布申維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Losee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: habitational name from any of several places called Loose (see   Loose  ) or Loosey. This name was established in the Hudson valley in the 18th century.

variants.name: Loose
meanings: English: habitational name from Loose in Kent or Suffolk, both named from Old English hlōse ‘pigsty’.
Flemish (De Loose) and Dutch: variant of Loos 3.

nameMeanings.name: Pieter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.description: After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York
Historical Boundaries 1683: Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Kings, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Pieter Jan Losee was born in 1659, in Long Island, New York, United States, his father, Jan Corneliszen Losee, was 35 and his mother, Janneken Pieters, was 35. He married Sara Jacob Kolfs on 14 March 1680, in Flatbush, Kings, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died after 1704, in Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pieter Jan Losee est né en 1659, à Long Island, New York, États-Unis, son père, Jan Corneliszen Losee, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Janneken Pieters, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Sara Jacob Kolfs le 14 mars 1680, à Flatbush, Kings, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé après 1704, à Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pieter Jan Losee 1659 in Long Island, New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan Corneliszen Losee 35 und seine Mutter Janneken Pieters 35. Er hat am 14. März 1680 in Flatbush, Kings, New York, Vereinigte Staaten Sara Jacob Kolfs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb nach 1704 in Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pieter Jan Losee è nato il nel 1659 nel Long Island, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Jan Corneliszen Losee, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Janneken Pieters, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Sara Jacob Kolfs il 14 marzo 1680, nel Flatbush, Kings, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 1704, nel Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Pieter Jan Loseeが1659年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ロング イスランドで生まれた時，父Jan Corneliszen Loseeは35歳，母Janneken Pietersは35歳であった。1680年3月14日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州キングズフラトブッシュでSara Jacob Kolfsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1704年以後にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーキングズブシュウィックで死去した。

ko.Bushwick, Kings, New York, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 부슈윅

ko.Flatbush, Kings, New York, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 플라트부시
ko.Bushwick, Kings, Colony of New York, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 부슈윅
ko.lifeSummary: Pieter Jan Losee(이)가 1659년 미국 뉴욕 주 론그 이슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan Corneliszen Losee(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Janneken Pieters(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1680년 3월 14일 미국 뉴욕 주 킨그스 플라트부시에서 Sara Jacob Kolfs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1704년 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 킨그스 부슈윅에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pieter Jan Losee nasceu em 1659, em Long Island, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jan Corneliszen Losee, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Janneken Pieters, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Sara Jacob Kolfs em 14 de março de 1680, em Flatbush, Kings, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1704, em Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pieter Jan Losee родился в 1659 г. в местности лонг исланд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Jan Corneliszen Losee было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Janneken Pieters, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara Jacob Kolfs 14 марта 1680 г. в местности флатбуш, кингс, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер после 1704 г. в местности бушвикк, кингс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pieter Jan Losee nació en 1659, en Long Island, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jan Corneliszen Losee, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Janneken Pieters, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sara Jacob Kolfs el 14 de marzo de 1680, en Flatbush, Kings, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 1704, en Bushwick, Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America.
